Example: Opioid Treatment: Day 1: I'm struggling with cravings. My family wants to help but I feel ashamed. Started NA meetings this week.
Day 5: Attended 3 meetings. Feeling more confident. Still have withdrawal symptoms but the counselor is helping.
Day 10: Two weeks clean now. Learned about my triggers - stress and loneliness. Started calling sponsor daily.
Example: Adolescent Treatment: I don't really know why I'm here. My parents say I have a 'problem' but it's not that bad.
Talked with counselor about why weed felt necessary. Started realizing I was avoiding feeling sad about dad.
Made a plan to call dad this week. Scared but ready to try.
Example: Trauma: Had another nightmare about the accident. Can't sleep without anxiety medication.
Counselor taught me breathing exercises. They actually helped during the panic attack yesterday.
Used my grounding technique when triggered today. Felt empowering to manage it myself.
Example: MOUD / MAT: Started buprenorphine this week. Nausea is rough but better than using.
Met with the prescriber; we're adjusting dose. Attended group on medication myths and stigma.
Two weeks on program. Cravings down. Worried about telling my employer about clinic visits.
Example: Isolation & risk: Didn't answer facilitator check-in. Don't want to talk.

cohort.label: Opioid — Alex
entries: Day 1: Cravings bad. Family reaching out; I feel ashamed. First NA meeting tonight.
Day 7: Withdrawal still there but meds help. Sponsor texted.
Day 14: Two weeks. Triggers are stress and being alone.

cohort.label: Adolescent — Jordan
entries: Here because parents made me. Weed isn't a big deal.
Maybe I use to not feel stuff about my dad leaving.
Called dad yesterday. Awkward but okay.

cohort.label: Trauma — Sam
entries: Nightmares again. Pills help sleep but I hate relying on them.
Breathing skills worked at the store when I felt dizzy.
Grounding at work when someone slammed a door. Proud I stayed.

cohort.label: MOUD — Chris
entries: Induction day. Sweating and anxious but clinic nurse was kind.
Group talked about stigma at pharmacy. Felt seen.
Stable dose week 3. Thinking about part-time job.

cohort.label: High disengagement — Riley
entries: Whatever.
Did one worksheet. Missed three check-ins.
Maybe I'm done.

cohort.label: Relapse worry — Morgan
entries: Passed old using spot. Almost stopped.
Talked to sponsor instead of using. Shaky but clean.
Need more coping tools for weekends.

cohort.label: Family conflict — Taylor
entries: Partner and I fought about money again. Almost drank.
Couples homework helped name what sets us off.
Agreed on a code word when tension rises.

cohort.label: Employment stress — Casey
entries: Boss criticized me in front of crew. Wanted to use.
HR meeting scheduled. Counselor helped me write talking points.
Shift went better. Used a break walk instead of vaping in the lot.
